creator: freebsd@nagilum.org
text:
multimedia/mkvtoolnix is currently (and has been for years) stuck
	at version 5.0 because later versions require a newer gcc.
	This patch updates mkvtoolnix to version 5.8 and retains
	the old version as mkvtoolnix50.
	IMHO it makes sense to retain the old version as it can be build 
	with FreeBSDs gcc whereas version 5.8 requires gcc4.7.
	Adjusted pkg-plist to match what's being installed.

Fix: Apply attached patch or extract attached txz.
